query: Anthropic Claude Science launch customizable AI workbench researchers auditable artifacts flexible computing access July 2026

{"query":"Anthropic Claude Science launch customizable AI workbench researchers auditable artifacts flexible computing access July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1836,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-science-ai-workbench","title":"Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists \ Anthropic","content":"Claude Science is an app that integrates the tools and packages that researchers most commonly use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
Researchers must work across dozens of databases, each with their own schema, contend with file formats that require bespoke data pipelines and viewers, and transition between a roster of tools: PubMed, Jupyter, R, a cluster terminal, and more.
Like a Jupyter Notebook, you can access Claude Science wherever you already work—locally on macOS or Linux, or on a remote machine over SSH or with an HPC login node.
Large analyses—folding a protein, for example, or running a genomics pipeline over a massive dataset—often require researchers to shift their focus to setting up a computing job, waiting while it’s sent to a cluster, checking whether it succeeded or failed, and pulling the results back."},{"url":"https://qz.com/anthropic-claude-science-ai-workbench-scientists-070126","title":"Anthropic launches Claude Science AI workbench for researchers","content":"## Claude Science connects more than 60 databases and tools in one environment, running on existing Claude models with no specialized biology training
Anthropic's push into scientific workflow tools follows its partnership with Bristol-Myers Squibb, which gave the drugmaker's workforce access to Claude for research and drug development."},{"url":"https://www.technology.org/2026/07/01/anthropic-claude-science-ai-workbench-scientists/","title":"Anthropic Launches Claude Science AI Workbench - Technology Org","content":"On Tuesday, June 30, 2026, the company launched Claude Science, a single workspace that pulls a researcher’s scattered tools into one place.
The beta runs on macOS and Linux for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users.
The work runs on the tools a lab already owns, whether an HPC cluster over SSH or a Modal account for compute on demand.
It taps NVIDIA’s BioNeMo Agent Toolkit to reach life-science models such as Evo 2, Boltz-2, and OpenFold3, and it draws on sources like UniProt, PDB, ChEMBL, and GEO.
Stephen Francis, an epidemiologist at the UCSF Brain Tumor Center, used the app for studies on glioma, a tumor that begins in the brain’s glial cells."},{"url":"https://www.developersdigest.tech/blog/claude-science-developer-guide-2026","title":"Claude Science Developer Guide 2026: AI Workbench for Research - Developers Digest","content":"Anthropic's Claude Science combines scientific tools, local code execution, and HPC integration into one AI workbench.
Claude Science launched on June 30, 2026 as a beta AI workbench designed for scientific research.
NVIDIA's BioNeMo Agent Toolkit provides GPU-accelerated scientific workflows within Claude Science, including Evo 2 for genomics and Boltz-2/OpenFold3 for protein structure prediction.
Claude Science targets scientific research with artifact rendering, HPC integration, and database access."},{"url":"https://thenextweb.com/news/anthropic-claude-science-ai-workbench-scientists","title":"Anthropic launches Claude Science, an AI lab workbench","content":"It pulls together the databases, code tools, and compute that researchers juggle every day.
Researchers can fork a session to compare two approaches without losing the original.
The launch leans on a tie-up with Nvidia.
It also draws on more than 60 scientific databases, including UniProt, PDB, and ChEMBL.
Nvidia has spread its money and tools across the AI industry, and life sciences is one more front.
Anthropic will also fund up to 50 research projects with up to $30,000 in credits each."},{"url":"https://www.investing.com/news/stock-market-news/anthropic-launches-claude-science-workbench-for-researchers-93CH-4768442","title":"Anthropic launches Claude Science workbench for ...","content":"Jun 30, 2026 — Anthropic will support up to 50 AI for Science projects with up to $30,000 in credits, with applications open through July 15, 2026, and award ..."}]}
